stemHtml: In passenger-carrying aeroplanes equipped with a flight crew compartment door designed to resist penetration by small arms fire, when shall this door be closed and locked?

options.a: From the commencement of pushback until top-of-climb, and again from top-of-descent to vacating the runway upon landing.
options.b: From the time the cabin crew reports “cabin ready” during taxi-out, until vacating the runway upon landing.
options.c: From the commencement of pushback until vacating the runway upon landing.
options.d: From the time all external doors are closed following embarkation until opening such doors for disembarkation, except to permit entry and egress of authorised persons.
